Model K RT: Standard Volatility With Coverage

Forecasts are minute-level Kalshi YES prices from the hourly price files. Reality is the official Kalshi contract result for the exact matched market, encoded as 1 for YES resolved and 0 for NO resolved.

Assumptions

  • Kalshi prices are YES probabilities. CSV values greater than 1 and no greater than 100 are treated as cents and divided by 100 before scoring.
  • Scored event outcome is the official Kalshi contract result: 1 for YES resolved, 0 for NO resolved.
  • Forecast rows are joined to outcomes by exact Kalshi market ticker when available; legacy price files without market tickers fall back to event_ticker + contract_label + strike.
  • Event tickers are interpreted as the contract settlement/end hour, matching the price fetcher's hour_end_utc -> New York event ticker convention.
  • Binance prices are diagnostic only. They may be used for strike matching upstream and audit mismatch checks, but never as the scored truth label.
  • Events present in the Kalshi price files but absent from the settlement CSV are excluded from scoring and counted in outcome_join_coverage.csv.
Scored rows104,933
Event contracts1,764
Brier score0.1279
Log loss0.3927
ECE0.0150
Audit mismatches55

Plotly was available, so charts are interactive.

Metric Summary

segment n_forecasts n_event_contracts base_rate mean_p_kalshi brier_score log_loss classification_accuracy
overall 104933 1764 0.498394 0.493850 0.127861 0.392733 0.812757
ATM 35131 588 0.493809 0.493579 0.142956 0.432106 0.786029
OTM+1 34922 588 0.305424 0.294627 0.116217 0.362217 0.831653
OTM-1 34880 588 0.696216 0.693586 0.124317 0.383631 0.820757

Output Files

Individual CSV outputs are saved next to this report in Standard Volatility: raw values, Brier score, Brier decomposition, log loss, calibration curve, expanded calibration error, sharpness, outcome join coverage, unmatched rows, and audit mismatches.

  • Loaded official Kalshi contract outcomes from kalshi_btc_atm_settlements.csv.
  • Matched 104933 of 104933 forecast rows to official Kalshi outcomes inside the Standard Volatility segment.
  • Standard Volatility contains 588 of 1268 scored hourly Kalshi markets. Hourly realized volatility strictly between the trailing 72-hour rolling 25th and 75th percentiles.
  • Hourly realized volatility is computed from Binance BTCUSDT 1-minute candles as sqrt(sum(log(close/open)^2)) over the 60 one-minute bars in each forecast hour.
  • Each scored hour is classified against a trailing 72-hour (4320-minute) rolling window using only historical Binance volatility available at that hour.
  • Rolling cutoff summaries for this run: q10 latest=0.00251833, median=0.00256496, range=[0.00129308, 0.00479875]; q25 latest=0.00302169, median=0.00304949, range=[0.00151308, 0.00547011]; q75 latest=0.00487723, median=0.00529946, range=[0.00265512, 0.00838105]; q90 latest=0.00632642, median=0.00692337, range=[0.00328579, 0.01111803].
  • Found 55 Binance audit mismatch row(s); see resolution_mismatches.csv.
